title: Markdown to HTML Converter
shortDescription: Convert Markdown into sanitized HTML instantly in your browser.
metaTitle: Markdown to HTML Converter | Sanitize Markdown Online
metaDescription: Convert Markdown to sanitized HTML in your browser with instant output, safe HTML handling, and no server upload.
intro: Turn Markdown into clean, sanitized HTML directly in the browser. Paste your Markdown, preview the result instantly, and copy safe HTML for publishing or development work.
overview: This Markdown to HTML tool helps you convert common Markdown syntax into browser-safe HTML without sending content to a server. It is useful for writers, developers, and content editors who need quick HTML output with basic sanitization to reduce XSS risks and keep formatting predictable.
howItWorks: Paste or type Markdown into the input field.
The tool parses headings, lists, links, emphasis, code, and other common Markdown elements.
Unsafe or unsupported HTML is sanitized for safer output.
Review the generated HTML in the preview or output panel.
Copy the sanitized HTML and use it in your website, CMS, or app.
useCases: Convert README content into HTML for a documentation site.
Prepare blog or knowledge-base content for a CMS that accepts HTML.
Quickly preview how Markdown will render before publishing.
Sanitize user-submitted Markdown in a client-side workflow.
Transform notes, drafts, or snippets into reusable HTML.

examples.title: Basic Markdown
examples.input: # Hello\n\nThis is **bold** and this is a [link](https://example.com).
examples.output:
Hello

This is bold and this is a link.
examples.description: A simple heading, paragraph, emphasis, and link example.

examples.title: List and code
examples.description: Common list and inline code conversion.

faq.question: Is the conversion done in the browser?
faq.answer: Yes. The tool is designed for client-side use, so Markdown is converted locally in your browser.

faq.question: Is the output sanitized?
faq.answer: Yes. The generated HTML is sanitized to help reduce unsafe markup and XSS risks.

faq.question: Does it support all Markdown features?
faq.answer: It supports common Markdown syntax. Exact support depends on the renderer used in the browser.

faq.question: Can I copy the HTML result?
faq.answer: Yes. You can copy the sanitized HTML output and paste it into your project or CMS.

seo.title: Markdown to HTML Converter
seo.description: Convert Markdown to sanitized HTML in your browser with instant output and safe client-side processing.
